LONG LASTING: Built to last, these strong plastic storage boxes with lids are made from impact resistant polypropylene that is fully recyclable.
SECURE CLAMPS: Keep the contents of your plastic storage box dust and moisture free, clip-lock clamps securely lock the lid tightly in place.

CLEAR ORGANIZATION: Our plastic organizing crates are more transparent than most containers on the market. That's awesome because it lets you easily stay organized without having to open your boxes or move them to check what's inside. This is especially helpful for toys, tools, food and clothing.
100% BPA FREE: They are made from high-quality BPA free plastic materials that make them strong, sturdy, long-lasting and easy to clean.
PACKAGE CONTAINS: 2 X Storage Box With Lid and Handles (3 Liters)
description: Product Description These Plastic Storage Box are made from high-quality BPA free plastic materials that make them strong, sturdy, long-lasting and easy to clean. Keep the contents of your plastic storage box dust and moisture free, clip-lock clamps securely lock the lid tightly in place. Perfect for home, office, or on-the-go use. Great for storing food, toys, and more! This multi-purpose storage solution is perfect for keeping your home, office, and kitchen organized. You can use it to store various items such as food, office supplies, toys, and more. The compact design makes it easy to stack and store, saving you valuable space. What can plastic storage boxes with lids be used for? They are perfect for organizing clothes, toys, books, tools, kitchen items, and household essentials while keeping everything dust-free and tidy. Are these storage boxes durable? Yes, they are made from strong, high-quality plastic that is lightweight yet sturdy, ensuring long-lasting use. Can these boxes be stacked? Yes, most designs are stackable, saving space and making them ideal for neat storage in cupboards, closets, or shelves. Do the lids close tightly? Yes, these plastic storage boxes come with clip-lock lids that secure the contents, prevent dust, and protect items during storage or transport. What sizes are available? Plastic storage boxes with lids come in a wide range of sizes, from small (for stationery or toys) to large (for clothes, blankets, or bulk storage).
